title: FsWrite
description: fs.write — overwrite a file with the given contents. Full-content write; patch-based writes (fs.patch) are a future primitive. v1 supports mode=overwrite only; the field is reserved so 'create' / 'append' can land without a schema break.

path.description: Workspace-relative path. Daemon rejects absolute paths and any path escaping the workspace root. Parent directory must already exist (fs.mkdir is a separate primitive).

encoding.description: How 'contents' is encoded on the wire. Use base64 for binary data.

mode.description: Write mode. v1 supports 'overwrite' only; 'create' / 'append' reserved for future.

size.description: Byte length of the file after writing.
